title: castilleja mogollonica
intro: Castilleja mogollonica, also known as Indian paintbrush, is a perennial wildflower native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Castilleja mogollonica include reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and congestion, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and flowers are often dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
